bind_gateway.description:
Gateway details:
Name: `{device_name}`
Device ID: `{device_id}`
Sub-device limit: **{sub_device_limit}**

**After scanning the QR code to add the gateway, select "Submit" to complete setup and add sub-devices in the app (please use App version 7.6.0 or above to scan and add)**

⚠️ Closing this page without selecting "Submit" will prevent the gateway from functioning properly in the app
bind_gateway.title: Scan binding QR code

gateway_success.title: Operation successful

data_description.api_key: Paste the API key obtained from the Tuya Cloud platform

user.description:
Create a virtual gateway device and bind it in the Tuya app.

Steps:
1. Open the Tuya API key guide: {guide_url}
2. Copy the API key from the Tuya Cloud platform
3. Enter the API key below and select submit

After submission, a gateway device will be created via Tuya Cloud and a binding QR code will be generated.
user.title: Set up virtual gateway
